name: cc-statusbar
displayName: Claude Code Usage — Quota & Context Statusbar
description: See your real 5h / 7d Claude Code subscription quota and how full the model's context window is — right in the VS Code status bar. Plus an auto-detected prompt-cache tier (1h/5m) and session cache stats. Reads local transcripts; fetches real rate limits with your existing token.

configuration.title: Claude Code Usage — Quota & Context Statusbar

ccStatusbar.refreshSeconds.description: How often (seconds) to re-read the session transcript and redraw.

ccStatusbar.cacheReadWeight.description: Weight of cache-read tokens in the `effective` metric (cache read ≈ 10% of a fresh input token). Keep in sync with tools/session-cost.py.

ccStatusbar.cacheWriteWeight.description: Weight of cache-write tokens in the `effective` metric (cache write ≈ 125%). Keep in sync with tools/session-cost.py.

ccStatusbar.quota.enabled.description: Fetch REAL 5h/7d subscription quota from Anthropic (costs ~1 token per poll, only while active). Turn off to keep only free transcript-based metrics.

ccStatusbar.quota.minPollSeconds.description: Minimum seconds between quota API calls (throttle to avoid rate-limit 429). Polls only when the session was recently active.

ccStatusbar.credentialsPath.description: Override path to Claude credentials JSON (default: ~/.claude/.credentials.json).

ccStatusbar.context.enabled.description: Show how full the model's context window is right now (current input ÷ the model's max_input_tokens). The window limit is fetched once per model from the Anthropic Models API using the same local token as the quota feature and cached 24h; if it can't be fetched the % is hidden (never guessed). Turn off to skip this lookup entirely.
